_purpose: App runtime config — server reads this for game title + topic frameworks. Edit here to change branding or framework labels (Phase 2 will add a UI editor for this file). quiz-bank-metadata.json next to this is documentation-only and is NOT read by the server at runtime.

branding._note: title_prefix 1~4 字、可換主題;title_suffix 固定 3 字、不可改(三端 UI 寫死格式)

system_A_standard_9._description: 標準 9 框架、適用於簡單 / 中等 / 困難 / 地獄四個難度

system_B_purgatory_4._description: 煉獄專用 4 框架(L1-L4 能力分層)、與系統 A 無對應關係
